title: Localized John--Nirenberg--Campanato Spaces
author_string: Jingsong Sun, Guangheng Xie, Dachun Yang
abstract: Let $p\in(1,\infty)$, $q\in[1,\infty)$, $s\in{\mathbb Z}_{+}$, $α\in[0,\infty)$ and $\mathcal{X}$ be $\mathbb R^n$ or a cube $Q_0\subsetneqq\mathbb R^n$. In this article, the authors first introduce the localized John--Nirenberg--Campanato space $jn_{(p,q,s)_α}(\mathcal{X})$ and show that the localized Campanato space is the limit case of $jn_{(p,q,s)_α}(\mathcal{X})$ as $p\to\infty$. By means of local atoms and the weak-$*$ topology,   the authors then introduce the localized Hardy-kind space $hk_{(p',q',s)_α}(\mathcal{X})$ which proves the predual space of $jn_{(p,q,s)_α}(\mathcal{X})$. Moreover, the authors prove that $hk_{(p',q',s)_α}(\mathcal{X})$ is invariant when $1<q<p$, where $p'$ or $q'$ denotes the conjugate number of $p$ or $q$, respectively. All these results are new even for the localized John--Nirenberg space.
